title: Crown of Salt
hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide.
location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs

villain.worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law.
villain.motive: Recruit principled investigators into selective corruption.

arcs.title: Discovery & Curiosity
arcs.summary: Validate the first anomaly, establish trust baselines, and seed investigative obsession.

arcs.title: Escalation & Unease
arcs.summary: Push contradictions, introduce manipulative pressure, and degrade certainty.

arcs.title: Danger & Direct Involvement
arcs.summary: Force personal risk, urgent tradeoffs, and irreversible consequences.

arcs.title: Resolution or Psychological Break
arcs.summary: Collapse competing truths into final judgement, compromise, or breakdown.

beats.title: Day 01 - First Breach
beats.narrative: Day 01 - Discovery Window. A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. now converges with police report brine sealed manifest in Port authority archives and salt catacombs, centered on the harbor fog thread. Witnesses are fragile, chain-of-custody is thin, and rumors can outrun evidence in minutes. Your immediate job is to create a beginner-readable sequence: who observed what, when, and under which verifiable channel. Core mystery target: identify who is orchestrating the manipulation, how the evidence chain was altered, and what event this operation is trying to conceal. If this opening sequence breaks, later clues become noise and players lose confidence in what they are solving.

Interference shifts from psychological pressure to direct operational threat against witnesses and evidence hubs. Choose a tactical posture deliberately. Every response should balance safety, investigative momentum, and long-term legal defensibility. Core mystery target: identify who is orchestrating the manipulation, how the evidence chain was altered, and what event this operation is trying to conceal. A reckless move may gain short-term progress but can permanently corrupt trust, testimony, and final ending quality.

endings.title: Documented Justice
endings.summary: Evidence chain survives scrutiny and responsible parties are exposed.
endings.epilogue: The investigation closes publicly, but residual files imply a wider network.
endings.sequelHook: A new sealed case number appears in your inbox at 03:11.

endings.title: Pyrrhic Containment
endings.summary: The immediate threat is contained, but key truths remain buried.
endings.epilogue: Witnesses are safe for now, yet official records are permanently altered.
endings.sequelHook: Unknown Contact sends a checksum that references a second operation.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: Player choices preserve stability by accepting manipulated facts.
endings.epilogue: Case status becomes classified and public narrative diverges from internal logs.
endings.sequelHook: An antagonist fragment congratulates your efficiency.

endings.title: Psychological Break
endings.summary: Contradictions remain unresolved and trust collapses across all channels.
endings.epilogue: Your board is complete but no version of events can be proven cleanly.
endings.sequelHook: A mirrored transcript appears using your own phrasing.

playerBriefing.roleTitle: Lead Case Analyst - Crown Of Salt Taskforce
playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: You were selected for contradiction-detection under pressure and your ability to keep novice teams oriented during crisis.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: At 02:17 equivalent local time, synchronized drops tied to harbor fog triggered this case.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: Witness survival, chain-of-custody integrity, and public truth all now depend on your branch choices.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Protect people, preserve evidence, and keep every decision legible to first-time investigators.

branchingMoments: Manifest audit vs smuggler flip opening
Expose logistics vs sever ritual command

caseFile.objective: Resolve Crown of Salt with an evidence chain that survives legal scrutiny and protects live witnesses.
caseFile.primaryQuestion: Who is orchestrating the harbor fog pressure cycle, and what truth are they paying to erase?
caseFile.operationWindow: 72-hour stabilization window, followed by a four-week escalation to final confrontation.
successCriteria: Maintain witness cooperation through escalating antagonist pressure.
Corroborate a full chronology from first breach to final confrontation.
Preserve admissible evidence across all channel and media drops.
Close with a coherent novice-understandable explanation of motive and method.
failureConsequences: Witnesses fragment or withdraw, collapsing testimony quality.
Narrative capture outruns forensic validation in public channels.
Evidence is recast as rumor due to broken custody chain.
The antagonist frame becomes accepted canon regardless of truth.
